title: Yeleo Lyrics Naan Sigappu Manithan Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Yeleo
Singers: GV Prakash, Megha & Chrous
Movie: Naan Sigappu Manithan
Music: GV Prakash

Yeleo, medhappu vandhiriche
engengo parakka vachiriche
kadhava thorandhukittu
kaatthu adikkudhudaa
manasu parakkudhu da doi.

Vilundhaalum elundhaalum
marupadiyum vilundhaalum
adada vilundhadhilum
laabam odru kidaikkudhe.

Ninnaalum nadandhaalum
neraa poi kavundhaalum.
adada adhirshtam vandhu
kadhava thatti alaikudhe

Thoongum bommaikudhaan
saavi yaaru kodhuthadhu
idhodaa kaiyya neetti
kaala aatti nadakkudhu.

Nigalkaalam edhir kaalam
nalamaaga ini maara
engo medhakureney enna pidingada

Naththaya pol irundhen
pattunu surundukuven
nachunu elundhu ippo nadakka thonudhada

Kappalaa naan irundhen
aadunaa kavundhukuven
puyala thaandi ippa neendha thonudhada

Panjara kedandha pandhu
sixer-u adikkudhudaa
sukkura dhisai enakku
salaam vaikkudhaa

Sandhiran enna vilai
sooriyan enna vilai
moththamaa vaanguren kettukodaa

Mazhaya mazhai adichu
medhuvaa kelambidichu
thoongu moonji maram poththu kulungudhe.

Parandhaa kiliyuminnu
paranil kedandha pattam
manjaa pottu ippa parakka thodangudhe

vedhayaa podhaivadhellaam
maramaa elundhida thaan
irudhaan vazhakayadaa machi mannaaru

Pojiyum aanaalum
pakkathula kodu kili
adhukku madhippu koodumadaaa.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Yeleo'?

'Yeleo' conveys themes of joy and celebration, reflecting the carefree spirit of life.

What is the context of the song in the movie?

In Naan Sigappu Manithan, the song captures a lively moment that emphasizes happiness and togetherness.

Who are the singers and music director of 'Yeleo'?

The song is sung by GV Prakash Kumar and Megha, with music composed by GV Prakash Kumar himself.

When was 'Yeleo' released?

'Yeleo' was released on March 15, 2014.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song 'Yeleo' from the movie Naan Sigappu Manithan is a lively duet that encapsulates the essence of joy and celebration. With its upbeat tempo and catchy lyrics, it invites listeners to embrace happiness and dance along. The collaboration between GV Prakash Kumar and Megha adds a unique charm, making it a delightful experience. This song perfectly complements the festive moments in the film, evoking feelings of excitement and togetherness.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Yeleo from Naan Sigappu Manithan is a vibrant celebration of life and joy, brought to life by the dynamic voices of GV Prakash Kumar and Megha. The infectious beats and lively lyrics create an atmosphere that's perfect for any festive occasion. Experience the energy and excitement that makes this song a must-listen for all Tamil music lovers!
stanzaMeanings: Hey, the mind is flying as if it has come to a new place, opening the door and feeling the breeze.
Even if it falls or rises, it will still gain something from the fall.
Even if you walk tomorrow, it will still be a lie if you fall. Luck comes and knocks on the door.
Who gave life to the sleeping doll? It stretches its hand and dances with time.
You have a good time ahead, but what will change? I am wondering what is holding me.
I was like a knot, but now I will untie it. I feel like I can walk now.
If I was there, I would dance, but now I feel like I can cross the clouds.
When the cage breaks, it hits a six. Should I salute the direction of happiness?
What is the value of the moon? What is the value of the sun? I am buying everything, listen to me.
Hey, the mind is flying as if it has come to a new place.
The rain is falling, and the mind is wandering, sleeping with a face like a tree.
The bird that flew has now fallen, and the kite is now starting to fly.
All the pain is just a memory, and it is still there, my friend, it is a way of life.
Even if it is a little, the bird next to it will also get a share.
Hey, the mind is flying as if it has come to a new place.
